docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2017 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAY-31-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA DELSMAN IS PRESENT.
